# Phase 1 — boundary with one curved edge. Exercises:
#   - curve directive inside a polygon body
#   - bezier discretization during pipeline run
#   - polygon-info assertion against the pre-discretized sketch

polygon outer
0,0
200,0
curve 240,50 240,110
200,160
0,160
----
polygon outer: 4 vertices

polygon-info
----
outer: 4 vertices, ccw, bbox (0,0)-(200,160), area 32000

set stall-angle=90
----
set stall_angle_deg=90

generate
----
total_stalls: 54

snapshot
----
